purpose: Test weaker Hadoop cleanup and shuffle-pressure anchors so the rebuild line can keep these actions without relying on direct cleanup-failed or shuffling-to-disk selected alerts.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 15:49:04,937 INFO [CommitterEvent Processor #1] org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.v2.app.commit.CommitterEventHandler: Processing the event EventType: TASK_ABORT

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 21:27:32,609 INFO [CommitterEvent Processor #1] org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.v2.app.commit.CommitterEventHandler: Processing the event EventType: TASK_ABORT
